Subject: Re: Zoca X Blue Bell Salon & Spa\n\nBody: Hi, I hope you’re doing well. I wanted to follow up on my previous message as I haven’t heard back yet. I’d love to connect and discuss the next steps for your growth plan. Please feel free

cause_analysis.narrative: Blue Bell Salon & Spa churned on 2026-03-13 after 203 days with Zoca. Sentiment turned negative on 2026-01-23 (phone_call) — first complaint keyword: "waiting for". Classification: service complaint. Negative signals appeared but no explicit cancellation request. 5 inbound message(s) went unanswered for 5+ days — this is the clearest operational failure on Zoca's side. Median Zoca response time was 10.0 days, above the 24-hour expectation.
recommendations: [Escalation] First negative sentiment on 2026-01-23 via phone_call. Triggering a same-day AM touchpoint on any negative keyword would have caught this.
[Sentiment] Add an automated sentiment alerting layer over app_chat/email that pages the AM when negative keywords appear.
[SLA] 5 inbound message(s) went unanswered for 5+ days. Enforce a hard rule: every inbound gets a human response within 24h, every day of the week.

[SLA example] On 2025-12-15 via email, client wrote: "Subject: Zoca X Blue Bell Salon & Spa\n\nBody: Hi, I hope you’re doing well. I’m excited to share some great news - your…" — no outbound response in 39 days.

[SLA example] On 2025-12-15 via email, client wrote: "Subject: Zoca X Blue Bell Salon & Spa\n\nBody: Hi, I hope you’re doing well. I’m excited to share some great news - your…" — no outbound response in 39 days.
